name: image
description: Image with optional caption, plus ImageGlossary — responsive 1–3 column grid of images as seen in react.dev
whenToUse: Use for screenshots, diagrams, and illustrations with an optional caption. Use ImageGlossary for a grid of related images.
whenNotToUse: Do not use for decorative images with no informational value. Always provide meaningful alt text.
example: <Image src="/diagrams/avl-rotation.png" alt="AVL tree left rotation" caption="Left rotation restores balance when right subtree is too tall." />
